title: ageratina capillipes
intro: Ageratina capillipes, also known as Mexican shrub sage, is a perennial plant species within the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Ageratina capillipes include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Ageratina capillipes is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical treatment for skin irritations and wounds.
